title: ‘Spider-Man: Far From Home’ Is Here, and So Is the Future of MCU (SPOILERS) | Exit Survey
format: Sean Fennessey and Micah Peters review Spider-Man: Far From Home, dig into Mysterio's fake-news angle, and plot where the MCU goes next.

films.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
films.note: Sean and Micah both loved it, from the class trip through Europe and Mysterio's illusion troupe to a J. Jonah Jameson stinger that got the loudest reaction in the theater.

segments.heading: Mysterio, fake news, and the future of the MCU

films.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
films.note: The MCU's previous Spider-Man movie, from the same director, writers, and producers.

films.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
films.note: The animated Spider-Man movie both hosts are "very fond of."

films.title: Avengers: Endgame
films.note: The five-year gap it creates, the "blip," is what Far From Home's opening AV-department montage is riffing on.

films.title: Captain Marvel
films.note: The comparison for burying the real reveal in the stinger. Micah says the movie itself played like a two-and-a-half-hour commercial for what came next.

films.title: Captain America: Civil War
films.note: Cited as the MCU already doing this: smuggling in a real-world theme, there the surveillance state.

films.title: Avatar
films.note: The box-office record Endgame is about to pass on its way back into theaters.

films.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
films.note: Jim Carrey's acting troupe of hired illusionists is Sean's comparison for Mysterio's team of visual-effects people.

films.title: Zodiac
films.note: David Fincher supposedly ran Gyllenhaal through 99 takes of moving a pencil. Micah reads that history into Gyllenhaal's Mysterio.

films.title: The Nice Guys
films.note: Where the hosts first place Angourie Rice, who plays Betty Brant here.

films.title: Iron Man
films.note: The novelty Sean measures superhero fatigue against.

films.title: The Avengers
films.note: Same comparison. Nothing since has matched the novelty of the first crossover.

films.title: Eternals
films.note: Chloe Zhao's next MCU movie, just announced with Angelina Jolie, Kumail Nanjiani, Salma Hayek, and Richard Madden.

films.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
films.note: No. 2, the car-scene showdown between Michael Keaton and Tom Holland.

Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
